mnemonics.title: VAR Rules
mnemonics.content: VAR is Very Awesome, but Restricted (to local variables and initializer blocks)

mnemonics.title: Inheritance Insight
mnemonics.content: Inheritance Isn't Implicit (var doesn't change the declared type in an inheritance chain)

mnemonics.title: Local Variable Type Inference Limitations
mnemonics.content: Local Variables Are Limited: No instance/class variables, No method parameters, No return types
